description:
GIVEN a user has entitlements for SNLA+
AND the user launches the MLB.TV app
AND the user has TTS enabled
AND the user logs in

**NOTE:** SNLA+ entitlement = SNLA_119

steps.action: WHEN the user selects the SNLA+ button in the header
steps.result:
THEN the SNLA+ page loads successfully
AND the following TTS statement is spoken, "On the <RSN> page. Watch Live, <name_of_feed>, <description> (if available), LIVE (if live content), Presented by (if available), <sponsorship_name>. Press select to play, press up for the main menu, press down to browse more content."
